name: Delectable Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Quick Cook Dry Cream Wheat
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except one can of V-8 together.
2. Shape the mixture into a loaf and place it in a Pam-sprayed loaf pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
4. Halfway through baking, smear the loaf with ketchup.
5. When the loaf is cooked and drained, pierce the top with a fork.
6. Pour the second can of V-8 over the top, allowing it to run down and around the meat.
7. Let stand for 10 minutes before slicing.
